narrative:
Forest / Jackson (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,247 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
